# Kledo MCP Server

> MCP Server connecting AI agents to Kledo accounting software. Provides read-only access to invoices, contacts, products, orders, deliveries, and financial reports.

This server exposes 24 tools organized by business domain. Use this file to find the right tool for querying Kledo business data.

## Invoice Tools

- [invoice_list](docs/tools/sales/invoices.md): List invoices. Use `type="sales"` for sales invoices (accounts receivable, unpaid invoices, recent sales), `type="purchase"` for purchase invoices (vendor bills, accounts payable). Parameters: type (required), search, contact_id, status_id, date_from, date_to, per_page.
- [invoice_get](docs/tools/sales/invoices.md): Get invoice details with line items. Use for: "invoice details", "show invoice INV-001", "line items on invoice". Required: invoice_id.
- [invoice_summarize](docs/tools/sales/invoices.md): Summarize invoices. Use `view="totals"` for total outstanding/overdue summary, `view="by_customer"` for outstanding grouped by customer (siapa yang hutang, piutang per pelanggan), `view="by_vendor"` for outstanding grouped by vendor. Required: view.

## Contact Tools

- [contact_list](docs/tools/crm/contacts.md): List customers and vendors with search. Use for: "find customer", "list vendors", "search contact by name". Parameters: search, type_id, per_page.
- [contact_get](docs/tools/crm/contacts.md): Get contact details or transaction history. Use `view="detail"` for contact profile (address, phone, email), `view="transactions"` for invoice/payment history. Required: contact_id, view.

## Product Tools

- [product_list](docs/tools/inventory/products.md): List products with optional search and inventory. Use for: "show all products", "search product by name", "product catalog". Parameters: search, include_inventory, per_page.
- [product_get](docs/tools/inventory/products.md): Get product details by ID or by SKU/code. Provide `product_id` for lookup by database ID, or `sku` for lookup by product code. Use for: "product price", "check stock", "find item ABC123", "cari produk by kode".

## Order Tools

- [order_list](docs/tools/sales/orders.md): List orders. Use `type="sales"` for sales orders (pending customer orders), `type="purchase"` for purchase orders. Required: type. Parameters: search, contact_id, status_id, date_from, date_to.
- [order_get](docs/tools/sales/orders.md): Get order details with line items. Use for: "order info", "what's in this order", "order line items". Required: order_id.

## Delivery Tools

- [delivery_list](docs/tools/inventory/deliveries.md): List deliveries with filters. Use for: "show all deliveries", "deliveries this week". Parameters: search, date_from, date_to, status_id.
- [delivery_get](docs/tools/inventory/deliveries.md): Get delivery details or pending shipments. Use `view="detail"` with delivery_id for tracking info, `view="pending"` for all unshipped orders (backlog, what needs to ship). Required: view.

## Revenue Tools

- [revenue_summary](docs/tools/finance/reports.md): Revenue summary for a period. Only counts PAID invoices (status=Lunas). Shows net sales (before tax), PPN collected, gross sales. Use for: "revenue this month", "berapa omzet bulan ini". Required: date_from.
- [revenue_receivables](docs/tools/finance/reports.md): Outstanding receivables analysis. Use `view="list"` for all unpaid/partial invoices (siapa yang belum bayar, total piutang), `view="aging"` for overdue buckets 0-30/30-60/60-90/90+ days with DSO, `view="concentration"` for Pareto/80-20 customer concentration risk. Required: view.
- [revenue_ranking](docs/tools/finance/reports.md): Revenue ranking. Use `group_by="customer"` for top customers by paid revenue (siapa customer terbesar), `group_by="day"` for daily revenue trends (revenue harian). Required: group_by, date_from.

## Financial Tools

- [financial_summary](docs/tools/finance/reports.md): Financial summary grouped by entity. Use `type="sales"` + `group_by="customer"` for sales by customer, `type="sales"` + `group_by="sales_rep"` for sales by salesperson (omzet per sales), `type="purchase"` + `group_by="vendor"` for purchases by vendor. Required: type, group_by.
- [financial_balances](docs/tools/finance/reports.md): Current bank account balances. Use for: "cash on hand", "bank balances", "available funds", "berapa saldo kas".
## Analytics & Commission Tools

- [analytics_compare](docs/tools/finance/reports.md): Compare metrics across periods or sales reps. Use `metric="revenue"` to compare revenue (bulan ini vs bulan lalu), `metric="outstanding"` to compare outstanding receivables. Required: metric, period.
- [analytics_targets](docs/tools/finance/reports.md): Sales target management. Use `action="report"` for achievement vs target, `action="underperformers"` for reps below threshold, `action="set"` to set a new target (requires sales_person_name, amount). Required: action, period.
- [commission_report](docs/tools/finance/reports.md): Commission calculation with tiered rates. Provide `sales_person_name` to calculate for one rep, omit for all reps. Parameters: period (required), sales_person_name, flat_rate.

## Sales Rep Tools

- [sales_rep_report](docs/tools/finance/reports.md): Sales rep revenue breakdown for a period. Shows invoices, revenue, and top deals per rep. Required: date_from.
- [sales_rep_list](docs/tools/finance/reports.md): List all sales representatives. Use for: "who are our sales reps", "daftar sales".

## Utility Tools

- [utility_cache](docs/tools/system/utilities.md): Manage API cache. Use `action="stats"` for cache hit rate and performance metrics, `action="clear"` to invalidate all cached data (force fresh API calls). Required: action.
- [utility_test_connection](docs/tools/system/utilities.md): Test Kledo API connection and verify authentication status.

## Status Codes

- Status 1 = Belum Dibayar (Unpaid)
- Status 2 = Dibayar Sebagian (Partially Paid)
- Status 3 = Lunas (Paid / Settled)

## Date Shortcuts

Use these as values for date_from / date_to parameters:
- `this_month`, `last_month`, `this_year`, `last_7_days`
- Or ISO format: `YYYY-MM-DD` or `YYYY-MM`
